findings.message: The compose overlay interpolates ${APP_WIDGET_API_URL} but this variable is not declared in .env.example. An undeclared interpolation resolves to an empty string (silently) wherever base.yml is composed (dev/test), and there is no documented declaration for operators to set it. Add APP_WIDGET_API_URL to .env.example so the environment surface is complete.
findings.suggestion: Declare APP_WIDGET_API_URL in the FRAMEWORK section of .env.example (e.g. `APP_WIDGET_API_URL=`) so the ${APP_WIDGET_API_URL} interpolation in base.yml has a documented source, matching the pattern used for the other APP_* vars.
